revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-230 

A continuous charge at low rate that is intended to compensate for the self discharge of a battery on open circuit and thus to maintain the battery in a fully-charged condition.

{{IALAFooter}}
